gloss: mi=I; lew=want; bu=go; mi dili=my place of belonging
mi=I; lew=want; bu=go; mi zifo=my dwelling

zh: 你是我的孩子，你是神的孩子，你是你自己的孩子。
en: You are my child, you are God's child, and you are your own child.
nufe: ti ne mi gela, ti ne ho gela, ti ne ti fe gela.
gloss: ti=you; ne=be; mi gela=my child; ho gela=God's child; ti fe gela=your own child

zh: 应该切碎我的身体，应当把灯放在太阳上。
en: My body should be cut into pieces, and the lamp should be placed on the sun.
nufe: mi matemi to be kopa. lawpa to ko ia mipe supa.
gloss: mi matemi=my body; to=should; be kopa=be cut into pieces; lawpa=lamp; ko=place; ia mipe supa=on the sun

en: The lamp should be in the home.
I put the lamp in the home.
gloss: mi=I; ko=place/put; lawpa=lamp; ia zifo=in the home

en: The lamp is in the home.
That thing is on my left.
gloss: ziepa=that thing; da=be at; mi=me; siwta=left side

en: That thing is on my right.
gloss: ziepa=that thing; da=be at; mi=me; deka=right side

en: The door is in front of me.

gloss: ze=this; pa=thing/entity; ne=be; bo=good; pa=property nominalizer/entity
fax=action as entity/nominalized action; ne=be; bo=good; pa=property nominalizer/entity
ze=this; fax=action as entity/nominalized action; pale=exist

tisi=human world; ne=be; sew=peaceful; pa=property nominalizer/entity

en: The people unconditionally receive a person.

ze=this; dow=building; ne=be; ba=big; pa=property nominalizer/entity

en: The door is in the middle of the home.
The message comes from the phone.
The wind comes from the west.

gloss: ze=this; pa=thing; ne=be; mo=bad; pa=property nominalizer

en: I go out of the house.

nufe: mi liofa i ti pale u.
gloss: mi=I; liofa=think; i...u=nominalized clause; ti pale=you exist

en: I tell you that you exist.
nufe: mi toli i ti pale u ia ti.
gloss: mi=I; toli=say; i...u=nominalized clause; ti pale=you exist; ia=to; ti=you

nufe: mi qe i ti pale u.
gloss: mi=I; qe=know; i...u=nominalized clause; ti pale=you exist

nufe: i mi pale u ne bo pa.
gloss: i...u=nominalized clause; mi pale=I exist; ne=be; bo=good; pa=property nominalizer

en: The mountain and the range exist.
The person whom you love exists.
gloss: gia=person; o=postposed clause marker; ti mela=you love; pale=exist

en: The message that I say exists.
gloss: qivo=message; o=postposed clause marker; mi toli=I speak; pale=exist

zh: 虽然我想要，但是我不去。
en: Although I want to, I do not go.
nufe: io mi lew, uo mi na bu.

zh: 虽然我是平静的，但是我不休息。
en: Although I am peaceful, I do not rest.
nufe: io mi ne sew pa, uo mi na hesu.
gloss: io...uo=although...but; mi=I; ne=be; sew=peaceful; pa=property nominalizer; hesu=rest

zh: 如果我存在，那么我会死。
en: If I exist, then I die.
nufe: iu mi pale, ui mi taw.

zh: 如果我学习，那么我能说。
en: If I study, then I can speak.
nufe: iu mi ro, ui mi te toli.

zh: 因为我学习，所以我能说。
en: Because I study, I can speak.
nufe: iuw mi ro, uiw mi te toli.

zh: 因为我不平静，所以我休息。
en: Because I am not peaceful, I rest.
nufe: iuw mi ne na sew pa, uiw mi hesu.
gloss: iuw...uiw=because...so; mi=I; ne=be; na=not; sew=peaceful; pa=property nominalizer; hesu=rest

en: This object is cut by you.
gloss: ze=this; mate=object; be=passive; kopa=cut up; ti=you

nufe: ti so i mi via u.
gloss: ti=you; so=make; i...u=nominalized clause; mi via=I live

en: This is in front of me.
gloss: zepa=this thing; da=be at; mi=me; awta=front
ziepa=that thing; da=be at; mi=me; posa=behind

en: Some thing is on my left.
gloss: zewpa=some thing; da=be at; mi=me; siwta=left

en: The tool is above the building.

gloss: ziepa=that thing; da=be at; mi=me; deka=right

en: The sun is in the middle of the sky.
I put the message in the phone.
This lamp is inside the house.
gloss: ze=this; lawpa=lamp; da=be at; zifo=house; niw=inside

en: Some lamp is inside the house.
gloss: zew=some; lawpa=lamp; da=be at; zifo=house; niw=inside
ze=this; gia=person; ne=be; low=solitary; pa=property nominalizer

en: You want to return to your home.
gloss: ti=you; lew=want; bu=go; ti dili=your home
mi=I; da=be at; mi dili=my home

nufe: jiw e mate e matemi pale.

en: I live and do not die.

nufe: mi e gi ne meva pa.
gloss: mi=I; e=and; gi=he/she/it; ne=be; meva=kind; pa=property nominalizer

en: What is in front of me?
You have a hand and use a tool.
nufe: ti ge mu. ti lo ke.
gloss: ti=you; ge=have; mu=hand. ti=you; lo=use; ke=tool

zh: 我看这个、那个和某个东西。
en: I see this, that, and some thing.
nufe: mi viofa zepa e ziepa e zewpa.
gloss: mi=I; viofa=see; zepa=this; e=and; ziepa=that; zewpa=some thing

en: That lamp is outside the house.
gloss: zie=that; lawpa=lamp; da=be at; zifo=house; nuw=outside

en: This thing is outside the house.
gloss: ze=this; pa=thing; da=be at; zifo=house; nuw=outside

zh: 我去博物馆、学校和商场。
en: I go to the museum, school, and mall.
nufe: mi bu musedow. mi bu rodow. mi bu mowludow.
gloss: mi=I; bu=go; musedow=museum. mi=I; bu=go; rodow=school. mi=I; bu=go; mowludow=mall

zh: 博物馆、学校和商场都在城市里。
en: The museum, school, and mall are in the city.
nufe: musedow e rodow e mowludow da mife.
gloss: musedow=museum; e=and; rodow=school; mowludow=mall; da=be at; mife=city

en: You get money and lose information.
nufe: ti gaw mow. ti law qivo.
gloss: ti=you; gaw=get; mow=money. ti=you; law=lose; qivo=message/info

en: He gets information and loses money.
nufe: gi gaw qivo. gi law mow.
gloss: gi=he/she/it; gaw=get; qivo=message. gi=he/she/it; law=lose; mow=money

nufe: luho e mew e mewmi pale.

zh: 灵、心和意识体都是好的。
en: Spirit, mind, and consciousness-body are good.
nufe: luho e mew e mewmi ne bo pa.
gloss: luho=spirit; e=and; mew=mind; mewmi=consciousness-body; ne=be; bo=good; pa=property nominalizer

en: I go to the place, the mountain, and the range.
nufe: mi bu lia. mi bu how. mi bu sowni.
gloss: mi=I; bu=go; lia=place. mi=I; bu=go; how=mountain. mi=I; bu=go; sowni=range

en: This thing is at a place.

nufe: palia e falia e malia pale.

en: I go to the north, east, and south.
nufe: mi bu palia. mi bu falia. mi bu malia.
gloss: mi=I; bu=go; palia=north. mi=I; bu=go; falia=east. mi=I; bu=go; malia=south

zh: 东北、东南、西南和西北存在。
en: Northeast, southeast, southwest, and northwest exist.
nufe: pafalia e famalia e matalia e tapalia pale.
gloss: pafalia=northeast; e=and; famalia=southeast; matalia=southwest; tapalia=northwest; pale=exist

zh: 我去东北、东南、西南和西北。
en: I go to the northeast, southeast, southwest, and northwest.
nufe: mi bu pafalia. mi bu famalia. mi bu matalia. mi bu tapalia.
gloss: mi=I; bu=go; pafalia=northeast. mi=I; bu=go; famalia=southeast. mi=I; bu=go; matalia=southwest. mi=I; bu=go; tapalia=northwest

en: The west is in the middle of the sky.

zh: 新的词和旧的房子存在。
en: A new word and an old house exist.
nufe: vi hepa e du zifo pale.
gloss: vi=new; hepa=word; e=and; du=old; zifo=house; pale=exist

zh: 新的花和旧的建筑存在。
en: A new flower and an old building exist.
nufe: vi nagu e du dow pale.
gloss: vi=new; nagu=flower; e=and; du=old; dow=building; pale=exist

zh: 声音、图像、气味、味道和触感存在。
en: Sound, image, smell, taste, and touch exist.
nufe: mio e vio e nio e gio e tio pale.
gloss: mio=sound; e=and; vio=image; nio=smell; gio=taste; tio=touch; pale=exist

zh: 美的画面、香、美味、舒适触感和哲学存在。
en: Beautiful image, pleasant scent, deliciousness, comfortable touch, and philosophy exist.
nufe: savio e sanio e sagio e satio e salio pale.
gloss: savio=beautiful image; e=and; sanio=pleasant scent; sagio=deliciousness; satio=comfortable touch; salio=philosophy; pale=exist
sa=beautiful; mio=sound; ne=be; bo=good; pa=property nominalizer

zh: 我喜欢救赎而不喜欢主义。
en: I like redemption but do not like ideology.
nufe: mi fote gosu. mi na fote vibo.
gloss: mi=I; fote=like; gosu=redemption. mi=I; na=not; fote=like; vibo=ideology

en: I desire and intend to go.
nufe: mi diho bu. mi vile bu.
gloss: mi=I; diho=desire; bu=go. mi=I; vile=intend; bu=go

en: You desire and intend to go.
nufe: ti diho bu. ti vile bu.
gloss: ti=you; diho=desire; bu=go. ti=you; vile=intend; bu=go

nufe: saniolu ne sa pa. saniolu ne mati pa.
gloss: saniolu=perfume; ne=be; sa=beautiful; pa=property nominalizer. saniolu=perfume; ne=be; mati=blue; pa=property nominalizer

en: A blue flower and perfume exist.
I enter and leave the house.
nufe: mi buniw zifo. mi bunuw zifo.
gloss: mi=I; buniw=enter; zifo=house. mi=I; bunuw=go out; zifo=house

en: You enter and leave the house.
nufe: ti buniw zifo. ti bunuw zifo.
gloss: ti=you; buniw=enter; zifo=house. ti=you; bunuw=go out; zifo=house

nufe: vidu e muw e piuw pale.

en: I know electricity, force, and wind.
nufe: mi qe vidu e muw e piuw.
gloss: mi=I; qe=know; vidu=electricity; e=and; muw=force; piuw=wind

en: The road is in the middle of the city.

nufe: mi miow bo pa. mi miow mo pa.
gloss: mi=I; miow=feel; bo=good; pa=property nominalizer. mi=I; miow=feel; mo=bad; pa=property nominalizer

zh: 我离弃那个、离开并离开你。
en: I abandon that one, leave, and leave you.
nufe: mi zava ziepa. mi tobi. mi melu ti.
gloss: mi=I; zava=abandon; ziepa=that one. mi=I; tobi=leave. mi=I; melu=leave someone; ti=you

zh: 他离弃那个、离开并离开你。
en: He abandons that one, leaves, and leaves you.
nufe: gi zava ziepa. gi tobi. gi melu ti.
gloss: gi=he/she/it; zava=abandon; ziepa=that one. gi=he/she/it; tobi=leave. gi=he/she/it; melu=leave someone; ti=you

zh: 时间、空间、国家和安宁存在。
en: Time, space, country, and deep peace exist.
nufe: kala e pata e mepe e piyema pale.
gloss: kala=time; e=and; pata=space; mepe=country; piyema=deep peace; pale=exist

zh: 我知道时间、空间、国家和安宁。
en: I know time, space, country, and deep peace.
nufe: mi qe kala e pata e mepe e piyema.
gloss: mi=I; qe=know; kala=time; e=and; pata=space; mepe=country; piyema=deep peace

en: I hear music, smell fragrance, and taste deliciousness.
nufe: mi miofa samio. mi niofa sanio. mi giofa sagio.
gloss: mi=I; miofa=hear; samio=music. mi=I; niofa=smell; sanio=fragrance. mi=I; giofa=taste; sagio=deliciousness

nufe: ti miofa mio. ti giofa gio.
gloss: ti=you; miofa=hear; mio=sound. ti=you; giofa=taste; gio=taste

en: I touch a tactile feeling and a comfortable touch.
gloss: mi=I; tiofa=touch; tio=tactile feeling; e=and; satio=comfortable touch

en: You hurt me and I am injured.
gloss: ti=you; ruma=hurt; mi=me. mi=I; dema=be injured

en: He hurts you and you are injured.
gloss: gi=he/she/it; ruma=hurt; ti=you. ti=you; dema=be injured

en: Many and few are both properties.
nufe: ve e no ne ma pa.
gloss: ve=many; e=and; no=few; ne=be; ma=property; pa=property nominalizer

zh: 许多他和少量的水存在。
en: Many of him and little water exist.
nufe: ve gi e no lu pale.
gloss: ve=many; gi=he/she/it; e=and; no=little; lu=water; pale=exist

en: I see the sun and the sky.
The lamp is above the building.
This is in front of me.

nufe: ti liofa i mi pale u.
gloss: ti=you; liofa=think; i...u=nominalized clause; mi pale=I exist

en: The school where people study exists.
gloss: rodow=school; o=postposed clause marker; gita ro=people study; pale=exist

en: I or you or he goes.
nufe: mi ua ti ua gi bu.
gloss: mi=I; ua=or; ti=you; ua=or; gi=he/she/it; bu=go

nufe: ho so i gi via u.
gloss: ho=God; so=make; i...u=nominalized clause; gi via=he lives

nufe: mi so i ti ro u.
gloss: mi=I; so=make; i...u=nominalized clause; ti ro=you study

zh: 虽然我意图，但是我不去。
en: Although I intend to, I do not go.
nufe: io mi vile, uo mi na bu.

zh: 如果你存在，那么你学习。
en: If you exist, then you study.
nufe: iu ti pale, ui ti ro.

zh: 因为你学习，所以你能说。
en: Because you study, you can speak.
nufe: iuw ti ro, uiw ti te toli.

en: I explain an idea and a smell.

gloss: mi=I; toli=speak; ie=through/by way of; muqivo=phone
ti=you; qe=know; ie=through/by way of; qivo=information

en: I work by means of a tool.
gloss: mi=I; lodu=work; ie=through/by means of; ke=tool

en: I build a temple for God.
I create a tool for the home.
